{{Quote|Where are you going? You have no business going up there. Everyone knows droids can't fly, silly.|C-3PO, to R2-D2|<ref name="dcf">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/sourcearchive/news20070706.html|text=Droids Can't Fly}}</ref>}}
"'''Droids Can't Fly'''" is a short story written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]], originally published in the ''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]'' and later archived on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

==Plot summary==
While [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] recovers from his duel with [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Solo]] has been placed in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] argue about the [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid's]] ability to fly the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] while in the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter's]] cockpit before being interrupted by [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]].
